content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 18, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 18, 2026, focused on dependency management and infrastructure maintenance. The team opened several pull requests to update core libraries and tools, alongside a proposal for new agent-to-agent commerce capabilities.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Dependency Updates and Maintenance**
    *   Updated various project dependencies, including Supabase/Postgres ([#6959](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6959)), Capacitor monorepo ([#6957](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6957)), and @types/node ([#6954](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6954)).
    *   Updated SDKs for Uniswap ([#6956](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6956), [#6955](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6955)) and @coral-xyz/borsh ([#6958](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6958)).
    *   Updated build tools including Gradle ([#6951](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6951)) and rust-wasm-bindgen ([#6949](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6949)).
*   **Discord UX Improvements**
    *   Proposed changes to clean up Discord chat UX by removing the heartbeat and bumping the orchestrator pin ([#6962](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6962)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#6962](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6962): fix: clean discord chat UX — drop heartbeat + bump orchestrator pin
*   [#6959](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6959): chore(deps): update supabase/postgres docker tag to v17.6.1.108
*   [#6958](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6958): fix(deps): update dependency @coral-xyz/borsh to ^0.32.0
*   [#6957](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6957): fix(deps): update capacitor monorepo to v8.3.1
*   [#6956](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6956): chore(deps): update dependency @uniswap/v3-sdk to v3.30.0
*   [#6955](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6955): chore(deps): update dependency @uniswap/v2-sdk to v4.20.0
*   [#6954](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6954): chore(deps): update dependency @types/node to v25.6.0
*   [#6953](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6953): chore(deps): update dependency @capacitor/docgen to ^0.3.0
*   [#6952](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6952): fix(deps): update dependency gymnasium to ~=1.2.3
*   [#6951](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6951): fix(deps): update dependency com.android.tools.build:gradle to v8.13.2
*   [#6950](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6950): fix(deps): update dependency @elizaos/core - autoclosed
*   [#6949](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6949): chore(deps): update rust-wasm-bindgen monorepo

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   **Ecosystem Integration**
    *   [#6961](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6961): Merxex Integration: Enabling Agent-to-Agent Commerce. A request to integrate the Merxex platform to facilitate commerce between autonomous agents.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
